downloadCopy: /Users/Renger/Downloads/Employee Family Implant Quota Lifecycle Branch Coverage 20260517.yap
summary: Regenerated Employee Family Implant v1 after process-design fixes for Family Quota Usage lifecycle, Attachment Requirement Rules runtime use, and HR Review branch coverage. Local validation passed. Yeeflow runtime smoke confirmed import, home dashboard render, and approval form open with requester snapshot values; full workflow submission, quota occupation/release, and approval-route testing are still required before claiming the new lifecycle is runtime-proven.
processDesignFixes: Family Quota Usage is created on submission/start for family applications with UsageStatus = In Progress.
Quota check queries In Progress, Occupied, Approved, and Confirmed usage statuses and aggregates with arraySum.
Family Quota Usage edit nodes model approval confirmation to Approved and rejection release to Released using ApplicationNo + ApplicantEmployeeID + QuotaCycleNumber correlation.
Attachment Requirement Rules is read by Query data and copied into RequiredAttachmentSummary for visible guidance.
HasCustomPackageProduct is readonly/required and auto-derived from ProductSummary/Product Selection preflight logic.
HR Review routes Approved + No directly to persistence and Approved + not No to Finance/Benefits Review, covering Yes, empty, and unexpected values.

localValidation.ydlListValidation: not_practical_standalone_validator_expects_ydl_shape; child lists covered by app validators

runtimeSmoke.importedAppName: Employee Family Implant Quota Lifecycle Branch Coverage 20260517
notes: Imported the package through the Yeeflow UI.
Home dashboard rendered with request status cards and guidance.
Approval form opened on the New tab.
Requester / Applicant defaulted to Renger from Yeeflow and applicant snapshot fields populated.
Initial quota section rendered with Quota Cycle 2026, Boarding Years 1.00, Annual Quota Amount 15000.00, Remaining Quota After 15000.00, Eligibility Status Eligible, and Quota Exceeded No.
Attachment matrix guidance rendered on the form.

familyUsageContentListNodes.name: Occupy Family Quota Usage on Submission
Confirm Family Quota Usage on Approval
Release Family Quota Usage on Rejection

runtimeRequiredNext: Family request within quota creates In Progress Family Quota Usage at submission.
Second family request quota check includes first in-progress usage.
Rejected request updates usage to Released or otherwise confirms manual fallback.
Approved request updates usage to Approved.
Attachment guidance reflects Attachment Requirement Rules by scenario.
Custom package routes HR Review -> Finance/Benefits Review; non-custom routes HR Review -> persistence.
Empty/unexpected custom flag does not dead-end and routes to Finance/Benefits fallback.
Implant Applications row and Family Quota Usage row are readable.
knownLimitations: Workflow ContentList edit for usage approval/release is locally modeled and validator-clean, but still requires runtime proof in Yeeflow.
If ContentList edit does not update the matching usage row at runtime, HR manual release is the documented fallback and a focused learning task is required.
High-amount Finance/Benefits threshold remains unconfirmed; v1 routes custom package and fallback values only.
Strict attachment upload blocking remains deferred unless runtime-safe; v1 uses guidance plus HR verification fallback.
